CALIBRA Privacy

Personal Performance

Know yourself.
Move with intention.

Calibra helps you track the dimensions of your life, evaluate where you stand, and take meaningful action — every day.

Download on the App Store

Coming soon to iOS

How it works

Your life, structured.

◉

Nodes

Define the domains that matter to you — Mind, Body, Work, Relationships. Your life, your architecture.

◈

Coordinates

Within each node, track measurable dimensions. Score them over time. Watch the trajectory emerge.

▸

Actions

Concrete things you do to move a coordinate. No vague intentions — just clear next steps with effort ratings.

✦

AI Copilot

An AI briefing that reads your current state and surfaces what to focus on — tailored to how you think.

◎

Evaluate

A dedicated space to take stock. Not a productivity dashboard — a mirror. See yourself clearly.

↗

Trajectory

Your overall score over time, rendered as a stock chart. Progress is evidence. Evidence compounds.

Philosophy

Built for people who take themselves seriously.

Calibra isn't a habit tracker or a to-do list. It's a system for understanding where you actually are — not where you think you should be. No gamification, no streaks, no noise. Just clarity, structured into action.

CALIBRA
